title: Rhythm: literary passage
text: She walked down the long hallway in silence, past the closed doors and the photographs of people she had never met. At the end of the corridor, the door to the garden stood slightly open, letting in the soft afternoon light.

character_tips.anna: Literary prose at 94 WPM. Beautiful and fast.
character_tips.maxim: Literature at this speed = professional novelist territory.
character_tips.klavochka: Like a beautiful story unfolding, my sunshine 🌷
